description: V5_tag — a 14-aa epitope tag (GKPIPNPLLGLDST) from the PIV5/SV5 P/V protein (UniProt P11208, residues 95–108), recognized by the high-affinity SV5-Pk1 monoclonal antibody for protein detection, purification, and imaging.

references.authors: Hanke T, Szawlowski P, Randall RE
references.title: Construction of solid matrix-antibody-antigen complexes containing simian immunodeficiency virus p27 using tag-specific monoclonal antibody and tag-linked antigen.

references.authors: Southern JA, Young DF, Heaney F, Baumgärtner WK, Randall RE
references.title: Identification of an epitope on the P and V proteins of simian virus 5 that distinguishes between two isolates with different biological characteristics.

references.authors: Randall RE, Young DF, Goswami KK, Russell WC
references.title: Isolation and characterization of monoclonal antibodies to simian virus 5 and their use in revealing antigenic differences between human, canine and simian isolates.

references.authors: Randall RE, Hanke T, Young D, Southern JA
references.title: Two-tag purification of recombinant proteins for the construction of solid matrix-antibody-antigen (SMAA) complexes as vaccines.

references.authors: Fritschle K, Mielke M, Seelbach OJ, Mühlthaler U, Živanić M, Bozoglu T, Dötsch S, Warmuth L, Busch DH, Skerra A, Kupatt C, Weber WA, Randall RE, Steiger K, Morath V
references.title: The V5-Epitope Tag for Cell Engineering and Its Use in Immunohistochemistry and Quantitative Flow Cytometry.

references.authors: Randall RE, Young D, Pisliakova M, Andrejeva J, West L, Rossler L, Morath V, Hughes D, Goodbourn S
references.title: Single-cycle parainfluenza virus type 5 vectors for producing recombinant proteins, including a humanized anti-V5 tag antibody.

label: V5_tag
note: 14-aa epitope tag GKPIPNPLLGLDST derived from residues 95–108 of the Parainfluenza virus 5 / Simian virus 5 (PIV5/SV5) phosphoprotein (P/V protein; UniProt P11208). Recognized by the SV5-Pk1 (Pk) monoclonal antibody. Also known as the Pk tag or V5 epitope.

provenance.sequence_source: UniProt:P11208 (PHOSP_PIV5, Parainfluenza virus 5 strain W3 phosphoprotein, Swiss-Prot reviewed), residues 95–108 (GKPIPNPLLGLDST), 100% identity over 14 aa; independently re-fetched from rest.uniprot.org/uniprotkb/P11208.fasta and compared byte-for-byte — exact match confirmed

functional_claims.label: The V5 (Pk) tag is bound by the murine SV5-Pk1 monoclonal antibody with high affinity (KD ~441 pM).
A humanized anti-V5 antibody (hu_SV5-Pk1 / Hu6) binds the V5 tag with high affinity (KD ~572 pM), extending the tag to therapeutic and synthetic-biology applications.

source.quote: humanized anti-V5 antibody (hu_SV5-Pk1) with KD ~572 pM

functional_claims.label: The minimal antibody-binding determinant lies within the tag, with core residues IPNPLLGLD and a beta-turn motif essential for SV5-P-k monoclonal antibody recognition.

source.quote: an epitope on the P and V proteins of simian virus 5

functional_claims.label: The 14-aa Pk oligopeptide (GKPIPNPLLGLDST) functions as a portable epitope tag that retains antigenicity when fused to the C-terminus of foreign recombinant proteins, enabling antibody-based detection and affinity capture.

source.quote: tag-specific monoclonal antibody and tag-linked antigen

functional_claims.label: The V5 tag contains no arginine or lysine within its antibody-binding core and is reported to be resistant to trypsin cleavage, with low hydrophobicity favoring solubility of tagged fusions.

value.basis: absence of arginine in the tag

functional_claims.label: The V5 tag is validated for immunohistochemistry on FFPE tissue, quantitative flow cytometry, and cell-tracking applications including CAR-T cell engineering and gene-therapy monitoring.

source.quote: validation for IHC on FFPE, quantitative flow cytometry; CAR-T cell tracking and gene therapy monitoring applications
